channel.title: Posts on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Terminal

item.title: Concept Pilot
item.description:
! This is to test obsidian with HUGO and GitHub for creating and hosting a knowledge base.

This pilot will test the feasibility of the use of Obsidian, HUGO and GitHub as a means of hosting a knowledge base for use in aspects.

I shall now attempt to update the contents of this file and see where we get with it :)

item.title: Laptop Build
item.description:
!

To build laptop turn on device :)

I am now messing about with this to see it’s capabilities!!!
